data.title: Add suggestion surfacing to sprint-list-epics.sh
data.description:
Modify sprint-list-epics.sh to surface pending .test-index-suggestions at session start (SC5).

## Changes
After epic list output, check .test-index-suggestions:
- Non-empty + <=10 entries: print each suggestion
- Non-empty + >10 entries: print count only
- Absent/empty: print nothing

## TDD Exempt
Mechanical conditional print block (unit exemption criterion #1).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] sprint-list-epics.sh references .test-index-suggestions
  Verify: grep -q "test-index-suggestions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
